headline: Akamai Announces Pricing of Upsized Offering of Convertible Senior Notes
summary: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., May 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM) (“Akamai”), the cybersecurity and cloud computing company that powers and protects business online, today announced that it has priced its private offering of $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of 0% convertible senior notes due 2030 (the “2030 Notes”) and $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of 0% convertible senior notes due 2032 (the “2032 Notes” and, together with the 2030 Notes, the “no
